falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 4200 would violate the August 2024 bottom's 4100-4200 support zone, proving the pattern recognition failed and the 'bottom' call was false

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic-level volatility inconsistent with a market bottom formation; the August 2024 bottom saw VIX peak at 28 and rapidly decline, so this would prove the current environment is a breakdown, not a bottoming pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield spread inverts further below -50 basis points and stays there for 5+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 40 assumes moderating recession risk; a deepening inversion would signal accelerating economic contraction that invalidates the 'bottom' thesis, as August 2024 saw the spread steepen from inversion toward zero during its bottom formation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
